title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at CL Educate Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at CL Educate Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the CL Educate Digital Technologies family as a Curriculum Developer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CL Educate Digital Technologies:
CL Educate Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
